L0.name: Onboarding
L0.description: Initial setup — founder completes profile, defines vision, system is configured.

criteria.description: Founder profile has all required fields populated
criteria.check: vault/founder-profile.json: personalInfo.name, personalInfo.timezone, personalInfo.communicationStyle are non-null

criteria.description: Weekly hours and quiet hours are defined
criteria.check: vault/founder-profile.json: availability.weeklyHours > 0 and availability.quietHours is non-null

criteria.description: Daily budget confirmed and risk tolerance set
criteria.check: vault/economics/daily-budget.json: dailyLimit > 0 AND vault/founder-profile.json: financial.riskTolerance is non-null

criteria.description: Vision statement exists with at least 2 sentences
criteria.check: vault/founder-profile.json: vision.statement is non-null and length > 50 characters

gate.evaluation: All 6 criteria must pass. Orchestrator evaluates at Tier 3 daily and on core-assistant notification.

L1.name: Discovery
L1.description: Founder explores direction — market research, niche selection, brand brief creation.

criteria.description: Business direction documented with target market
criteria.check: vault/business/direction.json exists and has non-null fields

criteria.description: Brand brief with name, positioning, and tone defined
At least one market research report generated
criteria.check: vault/research/ contains at least one report file

gate.evaluation: All criteria must pass. Evaluated at Tier 3.

L2.name: Presence
L2.description: Build online presence — content creation, social accounts, audience growth.

criteria.description: At least 100 followers across active platforms
5% or higher engagement rate sustained for 7 days

gate.evaluation: All criteria must pass. Evaluated at Tier 3.

L3.name: First Revenue
L3.description: Monetization — first sale, payment processing, customer delivery.

gate.evaluation: All criteria must pass. Evaluated at Tier 3.

actions: Unlock finance, operations, and audit agents

L4.name: Product-Market Fit
L4.description: Validate fit — revenue growth, retention, unit economics.

gate.evaluation: All criteria must pass. Evaluated at Tier 3.

L5.name: Scale Decision
L5.description: Strategic scaling — growth plan, resource allocation, expansion decisions.

criteria.description: Scaling proposal created and approved by founder

gate.evaluation: Founder approval required. Evaluated at Tier 3.

L6.name: Autonomous Operations
L6.description: Full autonomy — continuous monitoring, self-optimization, minimal founder intervention.

gate.evaluation: Terminal phase. Continuous health monitoring. Regression triggers review.
